# Brixo

> Brixo gives engineering teams visibility and control over their AI spend — across every tool, model, and engineer. See where it goes, understand it, and stay ahead of it.

Brixo is an AI spend intelligence platform. It pulls every dollar of AI spend into a single view, shows exactly where it goes by tool, model, and team member, and surfaces optimization opportunities — without putting limits on engineers.

## Product

Brixo audits AI usage across tools like GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Claude, ChatGPT, and custom LLM integrations. It maps token economics, identifies wasteful patterns (context thrashing, idle seats, over-provisioned models), and delivers a leadership-ready readout.

Key capabilities:
- Unified AI spend dashboard across all tools and models
- Per-engineer and per-team attribution
- Threshold alerts (not hard caps — engineers are never throttled)
- Prompt and context optimization recommendations
- Multi-model routing analysis

## Problem It Solves

AI pricing is complex: token economics, cached vs. uncached input, reasoning tokens, per-seat fees stacked on per-token fees. Most teams can't answer a basic question — where did our AI spend actually go, by whom, on what, and is it working? Brixo answers it.

## Company
